steps.title: Identify the scope signal
steps.content: The passage opens by arguing CEP was “crucial” to the Civil Rights Movement's success. The underlined phrase—”more than 7,000 in all”—provides a concrete number that emphasizes the program's extensive reach.

steps.title: Match the scope signal to the correct answer
steps.content: A participant count of 7,000+ demonstrates the breadth of the CEP's reach and directly underscores the extent of its impact on the Movement. Choices A, B, and C reference opinions, educational topics, and criticism—none of which a participant number conveys. That matches choice D — D is correct.
